name: med-autoscience
description: Codex skill carrier for the MedAutoScience medical research domain pack.

interface.longDescription: Installs the MedAutoScience domain skill; OPL owns generated CLI, MCP, product, and workbench surfaces while MAS keeps medical authority handlers.

Run MedAutoScience doctor and tell me what is missing.
